title: BidiBuddy
purpose: Angular practice app centered on loading and displaying place data through a `PlaceListComponent` and a small REST service layer.
features: Angular 9 scaffold with standard CLI project structure
Place list component that loads JSON data through a service call
Service-based data flow suitable for a directory or discovery-style UI
Local Angular development, build, test, and e2e scripts
current_work_guess: This reads as an Angular learning scaffold with one concrete place-list flow rather than a finished product.

suggested_next_steps: Document the expected JSON source and UI behavior more explicitly
Add routing or detail views if you want the app story to feel more complete
